## Epic 6 — Combat & Equipment (#73)

**Dependency:** #12
**Est. Effort:** Medium

### Goal
Design conditions and afflictions — the status effects that add tactical depth to combat.

### Condition List
| Condition | Effect | Ends When |
|-----------|--------|-----------|
| **Blinded** | Strong→Standard, Standard→Weak on attacks | End of source duration |
| **Charmed** | Can't attack charmer, advantage on social | Save ends |
| **Deafened** | Can't hear, perception disadvantage | End of source duration |
| **Frightened** | Can't approach source, attack disadvantage | Save ends |
| **Grappled** | Speed 0, can escape with opposed roll | Escape action |
| **Incapacitated** | No actions or reactions | End of source duration |
| **Invisible** | Attacks have advantage, can't be targeted directly | Attack/cast ends |
| **Paralyzed** | Incapacitated + auto-crit if hit | Save ends |
| **Petrified** | Paralyzed + resistance to all damage | Greater restoration |
| **Poisoned** | Attack/ability disadvantage | Save ends |
| **Prone** | Melee advantage against, ranged disadvantage | Stand up (move) |
| **Restrained** | Speed 0, attack disadvantage, attacks against have advantage | Escape action |
| **Stunned** | Incapacitated + can't move + auto-fail Dex saves | Save ends |
| **Unconscious** | Incapacitated + prone + can't move | Healing or save |

### Afflictions (long-term)
| Affliction | Effect | Cure |
|------------|--------|------|
| **Disease** | Progressive Fortitude damage | Medicine + rest |
| **Curse** | Varies by curse | Remove Curse spell |
| **Exhaustion** | -1 to all rolls per level (1-5) | Long rest (1 level) |
| **Wounded** | Healing halved, -1 to Fortitude saves | Extended rest or magic |

### Tasks
- [ ] Design condition list with mechanical effects
- [ ] Design affliction system for long-term consequences
- [ ] Write condition reference table
- [ ] Ensure conditions interact correctly with Weak/Standard/Strong system
